resources.string: Right after waking up, write down anything that comes to your mind for a few minutes. This helps clear your thoughts and start the day with focus.
If something takes less than a minute, do it immediately instead of postponing it.
Choose the most important or difficult task of the day and complete it before anything else.
Work for 25 minutes without distractions, then take a 5-minute break. Repeat several times.
When building a new habit, make the first step extremely small so it only takes about two minutes.
Delete apps you don\'t use and organize your home screen so only important apps remain.
Spend a few minutes thinking about what went well this week and what you want to improve next week.
Choose one task and work on it for at least 20 minutes without switching to other activities.
In the evening write down three things that made your day better.
Notice what time of day you feel most productive and plan important tasks during that period.
Try not to check your phone for the first hour after waking up.
Do similar tasks together, like replying to emails or making phone calls.
Spend about an hour learning a new skill, reading, or watching an educational video.
Perform a small act of kindness for someone without expecting anything in return.
Look at your goals for this month and see if you need to adjust your plan.
Divide your day into blocks of time for work, rest, and personal tasks.
Turn off screens at least an hour before sleep and relax offline.
Take a short walk and focus on your surroundings instead of your phone.
Delete unnecessary emails and respond to the important ones.
Whenever an idea appears, write it down in notes or a notebook.
At the end of the day write down three things you accomplished.
Spend a few minutes organizing your desk and removing clutter.
Schedule a focused 90-minute work session without interruptions.
Politely decline tasks that don\'t match your priorities.
Keep a bottle of water nearby and drink regularly throughout the day.
Write a short letter to yourself describing where you want to be in a year.
Have one meal today without using your phone or watching something.
Give at least three sincere compliments today.
Before going to sleep, write down the three most important tasks for tomorrow.
You completed the 30-day challenge. Do something enjoyable to celebrate.
